description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a padded, circular headband connecting two large, cushioned ear cups. The ear cups are predominantly black with a metallic gray outer shell, giving them a modern and robust appearance. The headband is covered in a soft, black material, likely faux leather or foam, for comfort during extended use. The ear cups appear to have integrated controls or ports on the outer surface, suggesting functionality for audio playback or connectivity. The overall design is sleek and ergonomic, suitable for personal audio listening in urban environments. The headphones are compact and portable, making them ideal for use on the go, such as in parks, on sidewalks, or in public transit.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear headphones with black cushioned ear cups and a metallic gray outer shell, connected by a padded black headband. The design is sleek, ergonomic, and portable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both ear cups and the padded headband, highlighting the symmetrical design and comfort features.
description_view_1: Side view focusing on the thickness of the headband and the profile of one ear cup, with visible control details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the ear cups and the curvature of the headband, emphasizing the robust build.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other ear cup's profile and the headband's padding.
